stemHtml: What items are allowed to be carried on board?

options.a: Strike anywhere matches, smoke hood with oxygen supply, permeation devices for calibrating air quality monitoring equipment.
options.b: Spare lithium battery, small oxygen bottle, avalanche rescue backpack.
options.c: Spare fuel cell cartridge, mercury thermometer, liquid oxygen.
options.d: Safety matches, aerosol, 70% or less alcoholic beverages.
